title: Pipeline Ledger Event
description: An immutable, SHA-256 chained event record in the ORBIT Pipeline Ledger.

streamId.description: Aggregate stream ID (e.g. project ID or service ID)

eventVersion.description: Monotonically increasing version within the stream

payload.description: Event-specific payload; structure depends on eventType

sha256Hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical JSON payload

prevHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous event in this stream (null for first event)

causationId.description: ID of the event that caused this event

recordedBy.description: Service or user that recorded this event
